entities.name: LATUR DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Maharashtra, India, facing severe agricultural challenges.

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where the study on farming systems was conducted.

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: A severe challenge in the Latur district affecting farming systems.

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: A challenge in the Latur district characterized by deteriorating soil quality.

entities.name: LOW SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A specific soil condition contributing to land degradation in the region.

entities.name: LIMITED ACCESS TO TECHNOLOGIES AND MARKETS
entities.description: A socio-economic constraint facing farmers in the study area.

entities.name: SOCIO-TECHNICAL INNOVATION BUNDLES
entities.description: Integrated sets of technical and social interventions designed for sustainable intensification.

entities.name: RAINFED MIXED FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems relying on rainfall for water and incorporating multiple crops and livestock.

entities.name: INTEGRATED ASSESSMENT APPROACH
entities.description: A methodology combining multiple assessment tools to develop intervention bundles.

entities.name: LAND RESOURCE INVENTORY
entities.description: A tool used for assessing land resources as part of the integrated assessment approach.

entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL ASSESSMENT
entities.description: A tool used to evaluate water resources and groundwater levels.

entities.name: MULTI-DIMENSIONAL SUSTAINABILITY ASSESSMENT TOOL
entities.description: A tool (MSAT) used to evaluate the sustainability of farming systems.

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of agricultural produce harvested per unit area.

entities.name: GROUNDWATER LEVELS
entities.description: The depth of the underground water table.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD NET RETURNS
entities.description: The financial profit earned by farming households.

entities.name: AGRO-BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety and variability of animals, plants, and micro-organisms used in farming.

entities.name: WOMEN'S DRUDGERY
entities.description: The physical hardship and labor burden experienced by women in farming.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: MILK PRODUCTION
entities.description: The volume of milk produced by livestock in the farming system.

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: A lack of sufficient water available for crop needs.

entities.name: SUGARCANE
entities.description: A water-intensive crop that the study suggests shifting away from.

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A crop recommended as part of a sustainable system to address water deficits.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A crop recommended as part of a sustainable system to address water deficits.

entities.name: SAPOTA
entities.description: A fruit crop recommended for use with micro-irrigation.

entities.name: MICRO-IRRIGATION
entities.description: A water-efficient irrigation technique used for crops like sapota.

entities.name: SYSTEMS SCIENCE APPROACH
entities.description: A holistic framework used for the large-scale transformation of dryland farming systems.

entities.name: DRYLAND FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems located in regions with low rainfall and high water vulnerability.

relationships.target: LIMITED ACCESS TO TECHNOLOGIES AND MARKETS
